textPlain: I miss the internet when it was like this.

I love that CERN has such a strong bond with their animals.  They are even monitoring the quantum entanglements of their sheep:
https://home.cern/news/news/cern/cern-scientists-find-eviden...
Not sure the Panicking pick depicts panicking though
The CERN Animal Shelter for Computer Mice is a non-profit organization maintained by CERN staff during their leisure time...
Oh CERN folks, you beautiful people
The site is so simple yet has so much soul - a part of internet lost.
It is still like this. You just have to drag yourself away from the big sites and you will find all manner of weirdness.
https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=43545349 ("CERN scientists find evidence of quantum entanglement in sheep (home.cern)"; April 1, 2025)

And yet, not everything is so pretty at CERN.Just consider their Large Hamster Collider!
It’s a travesty, and last I head, they were colliding billions of hamster per second. You also got to ask what they do with the resulting elephants and whatnot coming out of those relativistic collisions.
Reminds me of the fact that what to past or future civilisations perhaps looks dystopian or primitive, might just be jokes and a good time

not lost is it? this site is still upI think things like these have just become harder to find. There are some search engines which try to bring the "old" internet back to life like Marginalia Search.
